risk_title: School Crime and Violence Prevention Training Not Yet Implemented
risk_summary: The project includes a curriculum unit on prevention measures for school crime and violence within the teacher training program, but no teachers have yet received this training. This suggests existing or anticipated violence concerns affecting schools in targeted areas that the project is designed to address.
evidence_quote: The consulting firm responsible for designing the Diploma on Pedagogical Capacities for Early Childhood Education (ECE) Teachers and Educators has been contracted. The Diploma design will include the unit on prevention measures for school crime and violence.

risk_summary: The project targets six departments (Copán, El Paraíso, Gracias a Dios, Lempira, Olancho, and Yoro) identified as 'most disadvantaged,' which in Honduras context often correlates with gang violence, drug trafficking routes, and security challenges that could impede project implementation.
evidence_quote: 253 preschool education centers (approximately 300 preschool classrooms) have been selected in 45 municipalities of the 6 most disadvantaged departments of Honduras (Copán, El Paraiso, Gracias a Dios, Lempira, Olancho y Yoro)
